description.value: Target a flying creature within 60 feet. Until the start of your next turn, each time that creature attempts to Fly, they must succeed at an Acrobatics check to [[/act maneuver-in-flight]] against the DC of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Launch Fireworks], or the Fly action is disrupted. If all the creature's attempts to Fly are disrupted, at the end of its turn, it falls harmlessly to the ground below.
